# TableTurn Digital

> Web design, local SEO, and exclusive lead generation for contractors and small businesses across seven counties of Northwest Pennsylvania. Founded by Bret Ruth in Franklin, Venango County. Real, exclusive leads — never shared. Phone: (814) 209-8304.

TableTurn Digital helps local service businesses get found online, generate qualified leads, and grow — without the corporate runaround, confusing packages, or hidden fees. Built and run locally by Bret Ruth, who brings 20+ years of hospitality and client-facing experience (including Joe's Stone Crab and the Watergate Hotel) to digital marketing for the trades.

## Services

- Website Design & Development — Custom-built, fast, mobile-friendly websites optimized for local search and built to convert visitors into calls and quote requests. Starting at $500.
- Local Lead Generation — Targeted lead capture for roofing, HVAC, landscaping, and construction contractors. Exclusive leads go to one contractor only — never shared like HomeAdvisor. Pay Per Lead.
- Local SEO & Online Visibility — Get found when local customers search. Site and Google Business Profile optimization so you show up where it counts. Starting at $99/mo.

## Who it serves

- Roofing contractors
- HVAC contractors
- Landscaping and property care businesses
- Construction, remodeling, and handyman contractors
- Other local service businesses needing a website or more leads

## Service area (Northwest Pennsylvania)

- Venango County — Franklin, Oil City (home base)
- Crawford County — Meadville
- Warren County — Warren
- Forest County — Tionesta
- Clarion County — Clarion
- Butler County — Butler
- Mercer County — Mercer

## How it works

1. Free Consultation — A no-pressure conversation about your business, goals, and where you're losing customers online.
2. Custom Plan — A clear, honest plan: website, lead gen, SEO, or all three.
3. Build & Launch — Fast turnaround; all technical details handled.
4. Leads Come In — Qualified local customers start finding you.

## Lead networks

- Roofing Leads (NW PA): https://nwpa-roofing-quotes.netlify.app
- HVAC Leads (NW PA): https://nwpa-hvac-quotes.netlify.app
- Landscaping Leads (NW PA): https://nwpa-landscaping-quotes.netlify.app
- Contracting & Handyman Leads (NW PA): https://nwpa-construction-quotes.netlify.app
